title: taraxacum infestum
intro: Taraxacum infestum, commonly known as the dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is known for its bright yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum infestum include the ability to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Taraxacum infestum is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used as a coffee substitute, with its roots being roasted and brewed like coffee.
